SM64DS decompilation progress

Functions matched: 10,473 / 11,349 (92.28%)
Code bytes matched: 1,687,096 / 2,211,124 (76.30%)
Modules: 73
Rectangles: 11,256
matched unmatched each rectangle is one function, sized by byte count
Rectangles cover the arm-mode functions that live inside each module image, the same universe the matcher sweeps. Hover any rectangle for its name, module, address, size, and match status. Modules are sized by total byte mass, so the largest overlays dominate. Regenerate with python tools/treemap.py.
